title: UK startup showcases all-in-one water cylinder heat pump prototype

sources.title: UK startup showcases all-in-one water cylinder heat pump prototype
sources.excerpt: Nusku has developed a prototype of a fully integrated air-source heat pump system that combines the heat pump with a hot water cylinder and controls into a single outdoor unit. The design aims to simplify installation and reduce space requirements by replacing separate indoor and outdoor components with one pre-packaged system.

title: Chinese scientists build silver-free heterojunction solar cell with 25.2% efficiency
summary: The research team developed a plasma interface engineering method to improve indium tin oxide layers, solving adhesion, contact resistance, and stability issues for copper electroplating. The optimize

sources.title: Chinese scientists build silver-free heterojunction solar cell with 25.2% efficiency
sources.excerpt: The research team developed a plasma interface engineering method to improve indium tin oxide layers, solving adhesion, contact resistance, and stability issues for copper electroplating. The optimized process enabled uniform copper metallization and boosted device efficiency to 25.2%, significantly outperforming untreated reference cells.

title: Two-year testing shows how PV plants increase local temperatures in semi-arid regions
summary: A two-year field study in a 100 MW photovoltaic plant in semi-arid Inner Mongolia combined ground-based sensors, radiation measurements, and UAV thermal imaging to quantify how large-scale PV installa

sources.title: Two-year testing shows how PV plants increase local temperatures in semi-arid regions
sources.excerpt: A two-year field study in a 100 MW photovoltaic plant in semi-arid Inner Mongolia combined ground-based sensors, radiation measurements, and UAV thermal imaging to quantify how large-scale PV installations alter local air temperature, surface temperature, and energy balance compared with nearby non-PV areas. Results show consistent site-scale warming of 0.8 C.
